summary: Complete testing of 3 critical bug fixes in Jasper legal tech app. All bugs verified as FIXED: (1) Claude API now uses Emergent LlmChat integration - no more 429 rate limiting, (2) Dashboard shows correct 3-column Virtual Legal Cabinet layout with real AI analysis data, (3) Cases display risk score 75 with 4 dimensions and Florida statute citations.

Bug Fix 1 - Claude API via Emergent.evidence: Backend logs show LiteLLM completion() calls to claude-4-sonnet-20250514 via Emergent integration
Bug Fix 1 - Claude API via Emergent.no_429_errors: No rate limiting errors observed in backend logs

Bug Fix 2 - Dashboard 3-Column Layout.left_sidebar: PASS - data-testid='left-sidebar' found with cases list
Bug Fix 2 - Dashboard 3-Column Layout.center_area: PASS - Shows risk score, AI findings, James question card
Bug Fix 2 - Dashboard 3-Column Layout.right_panel: PASS - data-testid='right-panel' with deadline, actions, battle preview

Bug Fix 3 - Real AI Analysis Data.risk_score_75: PASS - Both analyzed cases show risk score 75
Bug Fix 3 - Real AI Analysis Data.5_ai_findings: PASS - 5 findings with Florida statute references
Bug Fix 3 - Real AI Analysis Data.3_next_steps: PASS - File Motion to Dismiss, File Security Deposit Counterclaim, Negotiate Settlement
Bug Fix 3 - Real AI Analysis Data.key_insight: PASS - James question card shows case-specific insight
Bug Fix 3 - Real AI Analysis Data.deadline_warning: PASS - '1 days' shown in red with 'Critical deadline'

Additional Features Tested.case_selection: PASS - Clicking second case updates all panels
Additional Features Tested.language_switching: PASS - Belgian FR user sees French text throughout
Additional Features Tested.reanalyze_button: PASS - Appears for cases with score 0
Additional Features Tested.navigation_links: PASS - Upload, Lawyers, Documents, Chat, Settings all work

critical_code_review_comments: Claude API integration correctly uses emergentintegrations.llm.chat.LlmChat with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY
CourtListener filtering now includes case type AND state jurisdiction for relevant results
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing

test_credentials.us_pro_client: test@jasper.legal / JasperPro2026! (English, 3 cases - 2 with score 75, 1 with score 0)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded users and cases
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 critical bugs are FIXED. The Claude API now uses Emergent LlmChat integration (line 671-697 in server.py) which handles rate limiting better than direct httpx calls. The CourtListener function (line 700-773) now filters by case type AND state. The Dashboard correctly displays the 3-column layout with real AI analysis data including Florida statute citations. Test user test@jasper.legal has 2 analyzed eviction cases with risk score 75 and 1 unanalyzed case with score 0 (shows re-analyze button).
screenshots: .screenshots/dashboard_us_user.png - US user dashboard with 3-column layout, risk score 75, Florida statutes
.screenshots/dashboard_belgian_fr.png - Belgian FR user with French text and empty state
